# ISO8601 state machine - enum-based format-slow path; complexity is
# inherent to the character-by-character timestamp parsing logic and
# cannot be meaningfully decomposed without obscuring the algorithm
formatSlow

# TLV type dispatch table - each case is a length-validated memcpy for
# a different fixed-width field type; the width (number of cases) is
# inherent to the TLV schema and cannot be reduced
parseFixedField

# IEEE 754 float-to-chars implementation - algorithmic complexity is
# inherent to correct floating-point decimal conversion; this is a
# platform fallback for targets without <charconv>
floatToChars
